chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA Nos. 808 & 809 of 2017 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ___________________________________________________________ 1. For order on CMA No. 3355/17. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For order on CMA No. 3356/17. 16.01.2026 Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar, advocate for applicant. Under instructions, learned counsel does not press these reference applications, which are dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in the connected file. Judge Judge Ayaz P.S.
